overall.description: First-person exploration of the Ravenclaw common room from Hogwarts Legacy, showcasing Gothic architecture with stone archways, a spiral staircase, and a high-ceilinged circular chamber decorated with blue and bronze furnishings, a Christmas tree, and magical artifacts. The player character enters through the eagle door, ascends the stairs, and explores the main common room including the fireplace and window areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw common room entrance hall with eagle door

events.description: the large eagle-shaped door opens to reveal the stone entry hall
begins ascending the wide stone steps toward the eagle sculpture

agents.ego_description: approaching the eagle door, waiting for it to open, and entering the dimly lit stone entry hall with the massive eagle relief

notable_agents.action: two students in black wizard robes walking up the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: large golden eagle sculpture with spread wings mounted above the wooden entrance door
Gothic pointed stone archway framing the entrance door
dark wooden handrails with vertical balusters flanking the entrance stairs
massive stone eagle relief sculpture with detailed feathers on the back wall of the entry chamber
wide stone steps leading upward into the common room interior

segments.scene_description: The scene opens facing the closed eagle door of the Ravenclaw common room. The door opens to reveal a narrow stone entry hall dominated by a massive eagle sculpture on the far wall. Two students in robes walk ahead up the stairs as the player enters the warm, artificially lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved spiral staircase with Gothic windows

events.description: transitions from the entry hall into the curved spiral staircase
reaches the top landing and approaches the white marble statue

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone staircase with ornate blue carpet runner, passing tall Gothic windows with blue curtains

entered.detail: curved stone staircase with ornate blue carpet runner featuring gold patterns
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass letting in bright natural light
heavy blue fabric drapes with gold ties beside the windows
white marble statue of a robed woman holding a book, set in a Gothic niche at the stair landing

segments.scene_description: Leaving the entry hall behind, the player ascends a narrow spiral staircase with stone walls and a blue carpet. Tall Gothic windows on the right provide natural light through diamond-patterned glass. The segment ends at the top landing where a white marble statue stands in an alcove.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw common room main hall with Christmas tree

events.description: enters the spacious main common room from the staircase landing
passes the decorated Christmas tree in the center of the circular room

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious circular common room, observing the blue and bronze decor, Christmas tree, and other students milling about

notable_agents.action: student in black robes walking across the room toward the center
student sitting in a blue armchair reading near the telescope

entered.detail: tall decorated Christmas tree with blue and silver ornaments and candles standing on a circular patterned rug
blue carpet with gold star and constellation patterns covering the floor of the circular room
upholstered sofas and armchairs in blue and grey tones arranged in seating groups around the room
tall dark wood bookcases filled with books set into arched wall niches
brass telescope on a tripod stand near the window seating area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase, the player enters a large circular common room with high vaulted ceilings. A decorated Christmas tree stands in the center on a blue star-patterned carpet. Several students in robes walk about or sit in the various seating areas. The room features Gothic arches, tall windows, and wooden bookshelves along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room fireplace area and window art station

events.description: moves from the carpeted main area to the stone-floored fireplace section
approaches and examines the art easel with painting supplies by the window
moves close to the lit central fireplace where a student is standing

agents.ego_description: exploring the fireplace area and window nook, examining the art supplies on the easel and approaching the warm central fireplace

notable_agents.action: student standing behind the fireplace warming their hands by the flames

entered.detail: large circular stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantel structure in the center of the room
full suit of medieval plate armor standing guard near the fireplace
wooden easel holding a painting of a castle landscape with mountains
table with paint bottles, brushes, and a large feather quill next to the easel
upholstered green velvet armchair next to the art station
tall white painted display cabinet with glass doors showing various objects

segments.scene_description: The player moves into the fireplace area with stone flooring, passing a suit of armor. They approach a window nook containing an art easel with a landscape painting and various supplies. The segment ends near the central fireplace where a student stands warming themselves by the fire, with the Christmas tree now visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow stone entryway into the expansive, vaulted grandeur of the Ravenclaw common room. It begins as the eagle door opens to reveal a warm entry hall dominated by a massive eagle sculpture, following two students as the camera moves forward. As the space narrows, the camera ascends a spiral staircase lined with blue carpeting and diamond-patterned Gothic windows before reaching a white marble statue at the top landing. The scene then opens into a vast circular chamber with high ceilings and a decorated Christmas tree centered on a star-patterned carpet, where students mingle among wooden bookshelves and stone arches. Finally, the movement shifts toward the fireplace area, passing a suit of armor and an art easel in a window nook before coming to a rest near a student warming themselves by the fire.
